name: Chicken Tarragon Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the chicken.
2. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, melt the butter.
3. When bubbly, add the chicken pieces, skin side down.
4. Saute for 20 minutes until deep golden-brown.
- Shake the pan occasionally to prevent sticking.
5. Turn the chicken pieces.
6. Sprinkle half the tarragon into the butter and saute for another 20 minutes.
7. Remove the chicken to a large plate or platter.
8. Pour the grease from the skillet into a cup.
9. Remove the root end of scallions, slice them lengthwise, then cut into thin crosswise slivers.
10. Add the sliced scallions and the remaining tarragon to the skillet.
11. Return 1 tablespoon of grease from the cup to the skillet.
12. Cook over medium heat for 1 minute, stirring.
13. Pour in the chicken broth.
14. Cook until bubbling; scrape the bottom of the skillet with a wooden spoon to incorporate all collected bits into the broth.
15. Let bubble for 1-2 minutes before serving.
